headline: Screen Saver protection that keeps moving
summary: Aster can now rotate through every background in your Canvas library without repeating one until the full set has played. Configurable pixel shifting adds another layer of protection for displays that stay on for long periods.

features.title: Rotate the whole Canvas library
features.description: The Screen Saver uses a shuffled queue of every current Canvas background, completing the set before anything repeats.

features.title: Stays in sync
features.description: Importing or removing a Canvas item updates the installed Screen Saver playlist automatically the next time it runs.

features.title: Pixel shifting
features.description: Overscanned Screen Saver content moves gently at your chosen interval so bright details do not remain on the same pixels.
